Changelog¶

Changelog¶

All notable changes to sqCAD will be documented in this file.

This project follows Semantic Versioning.

[Unreleased]¶

Added¶

  • Initial project scaffolding (packaging, docs, CI).

Changed¶

Fixed¶

Deprecated¶

Removed¶

Security¶

[0.0.1] - 2026-03-01¶

Added¶

  • Initial PyPI release.

  • Sphinx documentation site deployed via GitHub Pages.
